predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person.

predicates.name: is_heir_of
predicates.description: The first person is an heir of the second person.

predicates.name: served_as_family_principal_dwelling_at_estate_opening
predicates.description: The immovable property served as the family's principal dwelling when the deceased person's estate opened.

predicates.name: obtains_exclusive_lease_right
predicates.description: The surviving spouse obtains the exclusive right to the lease of the immovable property in relation to the deceased person's estate.

predicates.name: excluded_from_lease_right
predicates.description: The heir is excluded from the right to the lease of the immovable property in relation to the deceased person's estate.
